Headline: #70 Division Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Division/Dearborn
ShortDescription: Eastbound  70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted via division, State, Oak and Dearborn: due to, street blockage near Division/Dearborn.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound  #70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted via division, State, Oak and Dearborn: due to, street blockage near Division/Dearborn.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
